name: Pax Gold
description: Pax Gold (PAXG) is a Paxos-issued digital asset backed by one fine troy ounce of London Good Delivery gold. It is designed to provide blockchain-based ownership and transferability of physical gold, with redemption options governed by Paxos terms.

_meta.notes: Updated docsUrl after source-health monitoring found the previous docs.paxos.com PAXG guide returning Internal Error. Replaced with official Paxos Help Center PAXG support section.
